title: Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 5: The Best Blades
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:The_Best_Blades.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 5:
The Best Blades'' |writer=Various |penciller=Various |inker= |letterer=Various |colorist=[[Brad Anderson]] |cover artist=[[Tomás Giorello]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[November 24]], [[2004]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/10-184/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Volume-5-The-Best-Blades-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 5: The Best Blades TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=144 |isbn=9781593072735 |isbn2= |timeline=[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] |series=*[[Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' trade paperbacks]] *''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' |issues=60-62, 64, ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' |preceded by=''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 4: Light and Dark]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 6: On the Fields of Battle]]'' }} '''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 5: The Best Blades''''' is the fifth volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars (trade paperbacks)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. Volume 5 collects ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' issues 60-62, [[Republic 64|64]], and ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]''. It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[November 24]], [[2004]]. ==Publisher's summary== {{Quote|Try us all, these times do. In this war, unsheathed must all of the Jedi's blades be. Survive constant use, even the best blades cannot.|Master Yoda|''Jedi: Yoda''}} ''The darkest days of the Clone Wars have arrived, when even victories are cause for abiding sorrow; when the hopes for a brighter future are lost in the turmoil of a divided galaxy; and when friendships are tools of convenience and the reason for betrayals. From political intrigue within the Senate to bloody battlefields on exotic worlds, the war has left its mark on the bystanders as well as the combatants, and the events in this wide-ranging volume reveal the extent of the damage.'' ''Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker battle for survival, Senator Bail Organa struggles to preserve freedom within the Republic, and Master Yoda strives to prevent an old friend from plunging a system into war in four exciting stories from the Clone Wars!'' ==Contents== *[[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]] *[[Republic 64|''Republic'' 64]] *[[Republic 60|''Republic'' 60]] *[[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]] *''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 5: The Best Blades}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781593072735}}; [[November 24]], [[2004]]; [[Dark Horse Comics]]; US paperback ===Cover gallery=== File:The_Best_Blades.jpg|Cover File:CWv5-TheBestBlades-FC.png|Front cover art File:CWv5-TheBestBlades-wrap.jpg|Full wraparound cover ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/10-184/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Volume-5-The-Best-Blades-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 5: The Best Blades TPB}} {{RepublicNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: კლონების ომები, ტომი 5: საუკეთესო სამართებლები |pl=Clone Wars 5: The Best Blades }} [[Category:Star Wars: Clone Wars trade paperbacks]]
